title: doliocarpus littoralis
intro: Doliocarpus littoralis, also known as the coastal berry or mountain pepper, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Doliocarpus littoralis include reducing inflammation and pain, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and protecting against oxidative stress and cell damage. Herbal preparations of Doliocarpus littoralis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
